titleStmt.title: SII 41.292: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 292. (A.R. No. 508 of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the kitchen in the Jambukēśvara temple, at Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: Incomplete. Sale of land, to the temple of Tiruvāṉaikkā, by Kāṭṭūruḍaiyāṉ Piḷḷāṉ Chēndāṉ (mentioned in the above inscription) and his younger brother, who had kāṇi rights in Vaḷavanallūr, a dēvadāna of the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvana ccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājarājarāja = [Picture]tevar yāṇṭu 2 10 4 mituṉa nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa coti nāḷ pāṇṭi kulācaṉivaḷa nāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikā
Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevar tiruvaruḷāl Ivar kaṉmikaḷukku nilavilai pramāṇaicaivutiṭṭu Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉa vaḷavanallūrkkāṇiyuṭaiya kāṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ piḷḷāṉ centāṉu mivaṉ tampi piḷḷāṉ civa
ntāṉum Ivviruvom Ivvūril Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāy nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta cakkaravatti Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpālkellai maḻavataraiyar viḷainilam paṟaiyaṉ ceykku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai virāṭarāyar kāṇi
puṉcey toṭṭattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai maḻavataraiyar kāṇi puṉceykuḻicceykku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai paraṭaiyarāyar kāṇi puṉcai pilāntoṭṭattukku teṟkkum Āka Iṉṉāṉke
Digital edition of SII 41.292 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
